rationale: Hit 'absolutely' at 1153ms — particles already mid-flight when the word lands. Text slams from 3.5x scale in 0.32s. White void over the energy peak of the hook.
initJs: var cv=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-cv');var ctx=cv.getContext('2d');var W=1080,H=1920,CX=540,CY=205;var pts=[];for(var i=0;i<2000;i++){var a=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,spd=5+Math.random()*16;pts.push({x:CX+(Math.random()-.5)*130,y:CY+(Math.random()-.5)*90,vx:Math.cos(a)*spd,vy:Math.sin(a)*spd-3.5,life:Math.random()*.3,decay:0.0038+Math.random()*.011,sz:0.8+Math.random()*4.5,op:0.7+Math.random()*.3});}function tick(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);for(var i=0;i<pts.length;i++){var p=pts[i];p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;p.vy+=0.024;p.vx*=0.965;p.vy*=0.965;p.life+=p.decay;var a=p.op*Math.max(0,1-p.life);if(a>.005){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.sz,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,'+a+')';ctx.fill();}if(p.life>=1){var an=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,sp=5+Math.random()*16;p.x=CX+(Math.random()-.5)*110;p.y=CY+(Math.random()-.5)*80;p.vx=Math.cos(an)*sp;p.vy=Math.sin(an)*sp-3.5;p.life=0;}}requestAnimationFrame(tick);}requestAnimationFrame(tick);var t=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-t');el._tl=gsap.timeline({paused:true}).fromTo(t,{opacity:0,scale:3.5,filter:'blur(80px)'},{opacity:1,scale:1,filter:'blur(0px)',duration:0.32,ease:'power4.out'}).fromTo(cv,{opacity:0},{opacity:1,duration:0.28,ease:'power2.out'},0).to({},{duration:1.05}).to(t,{opacity:0,scale:0.38,filter:'blur(45px)',duration:0.28,ease:'power3.in'}).to(cv,{opacity:0,duration:0.28},'<');

rationale: Hits on 'number' at 7480ms. '#1' at 380px crimson. Gone in 1.9s. No words — just the claim. Vortex of white particles orbiting the glyph.
html:
#1
CODING TOOL · 2026
initJs: var cv=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-cv');var ctx=cv.getContext('2d');var W=1080,H=1920,CX=540,CY=875;var pts=[];for(var i=0;i<900;i++){var a=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,r=50+Math.random()*520;pts.push({a:a,r:r,spd:(0.011+Math.random()*.026)*(Math.random()<.3?-1:1),life:Math.random(),decay:0.005+Math.random()*.008,sz:0.5+Math.random()*3.5,op:0.5+Math.random()*.45,pull:0.982+Math.random()*.01});}function tick(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);for(var i=0;i<pts.length;i++){var p=pts[i];p.a+=p.spd;p.r*=p.pull;p.x=CX+Math.cos(p.a)*p.r;p.y=CY+Math.sin(p.a)*p.r;p.life+=p.decay;var a=p.op*Math.max(0,1-p.life);if(a>.005){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.sz,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,'+a+')';ctx.fill();}if(p.life>=1||p.r<18){var na=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,nr=120+Math.random()*530;p.a=na;p.r=nr;p.life=0;}}requestAnimationFrame(tick);}requestAnimationFrame(tick);var n=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-n');var s=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-s');el._tl=gsap.timeline({paused:true}).fromTo(n,{opacity:0,scale:5,filter:'blur(100px)'},{opacity:1,scale:1,filter:'blur(0px)',duration:0.36,ease:'power4.out'}).fromTo(cv,{opacity:0},{opacity:1,duration:0.32,ease:'power2.out'},0).fromTo(s,{opacity:0,y:28},{opacity:1,y:0,duration:0.34,ease:'power2.out'},0.26).to({},{duration:0.85}).to(n,{opacity:0,scale:0.45,filter:'blur(70px)',duration:0.3,ease:'power3.in'}).to(s,{opacity:0,duration:0.26,ease:'power2.in'},'<').to(cv,{opacity:0,duration:0.3},'<');

rationale: The hardest editorial moment: 'But I did something DIFFERENT.' 1800 particles converge from all four edges simultaneously. Dark veil dims the video. Text slams from 2.5x. Crimson 'DIFFERENT.' signals disruption. The implosion matches the conceptual 'focusing' of doing something others didn't.
html: SOMETHINGDIFFERENT.
initJs: var cv=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-cv');var ctx=cv.getContext('2d');var W=1080,H=1920,CX=540,CY=960;var pts=[];function mkPt(){var s=Math.floor(Math.random()*4),x,y;if(s===0){x=Math.random()*W;y=0;}else if(s===1){x=W;y=Math.random()*H;}else if(s===2){x=Math.random()*W;y=H;}else{x=0;y=Math.random()*H;}return{x:x,y:y,life:0,decay:0.0038+Math.random()*.007,sz:0.8+Math.random()*4.2,op:0.6+Math.random()*.4};}for(var i=0;i<1800;i++)pts.push(mkPt());function tick(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);for(var i=0;i<pts.length;i++){var p=pts[i];var dx=CX-p.x,dy=CY-p.y,d=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy)+0.1;p.x+=dx/d*13;p.y+=dy/d*13;p.life+=p.decay;var a=p.op*Math.max(0,1-p.life);if(a>.005&&d>13){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.sz,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,'+a+')';ctx.fill();}if(p.life>=1||d<=13){var np=mkPt();p.x=np.x;p.y=np.y;p.life=0;p.decay=np.decay;p.sz=np.sz;p.op=np.op;}}requestAnimationFrame(tick);}requestAnimationFrame(tick);var vl=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-vl');var t=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-t');el._tl=gsap.timeline({paused:true}).to(vl,{opacity:0.68,duration:0.3,ease:'power2.out'}).fromTo(cv,{opacity:0},{opacity:1,duration:0.42,ease:'power2.out'},0).fromTo(t,{opacity:0,scale:2.5,filter:'blur(70px)'},{opacity:1,scale:1,filter:'blur(0px)',duration:0.42,ease:'power4.out'},0.28).to({},{duration:1.8}).to(t,{opacity:0,scale:0.52,filter:'blur(45px)',duration:0.35,ease:'power3.in'}).to(vl,{opacity:0,duration:0.42,ease:'power2.in'},'<').to(cv,{opacity:0,duration:0.38},'<');

rationale: Hits ON the word 'one' at 28853ms. 'ONE' at 300px — so massive it IS the frame. 'CONVERSATION.' at 88px anchors the concept. 1400 particles rise upward from text like breath, like exhale, like something effortless. The visual matches the claim: one breath, all your content.
html: ONECONVERSATION.
initJs: var cv=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-cv');var ctx=cv.getContext('2d');var W=1080,H=1920,CX=540,CY=1010;var pts=[];for(var i=0;i<1400;i++){pts.push({x:CX+(Math.random()-.5)*620,y:CY+Math.random()*140,vx:(Math.random()-.5)*2.4,vy:-(1.3+Math.random()*4.8),life:Math.random()*.5,decay:0.0038+Math.random()*.009,sz:0.5+Math.random()*3.8,op:0.45+Math.random()*.5});}function tick(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);for(var i=0;i<pts.length;i++){var p=pts[i];p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;p.vx+=(Math.random()-.5)*.07;p.life+=p.decay;var a=p.op*Math.max(0,1-p.life);if(a>.005){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.sz,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,'+a+')';ctx.fill();}if(p.life>=1){p.x=CX+(Math.random()-.5)*600;p.y=CY+Math.random()*150;p.vx=(Math.random()-.5)*2.4;p.vy=-(1.3+Math.random()*4.8);p.life=0;}}requestAnimationFrame(tick);}requestAnimationFrame(tick);var t=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-t');el._tl=gsap.timeline({paused:true}).fromTo(cv,{opacity:0},{opacity:1,duration:0.45,ease:'power2.out'}).fromTo(t,{opacity:0,y:55,filter:'blur(25px)'},{opacity:1,y:0,filter:'blur(0px)',duration:0.46,ease:'power3.out'},0.1).to({},{duration:1.18}).to(t,{opacity:0,y:-45,filter:'blur(22px)',duration:0.36,ease:'power2.in'}).to(cv,{opacity:0,duration:0.44,ease:'power2.in'},'<');

rationale: Hits on 'AI' at 49368ms — 'your own AI agent to create your content creatives.' Particle halo orbits the text. 'YOUR OWN' white, 'AI AGENT' crimson. CTA fades in at 1.4s driving retention. Orbit ring = the system spinning autonomously while you do nothing.
css: .cls-__ID__-w{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:1080px;height:1920px;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;} .cls-__ID__-cv{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:1080px;height:1920px;mix-blend-mode:screen;opacity:0;} .cls-__ID__-t{position:absolute;top:20%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);text-align:center;opacity:0;} .cls-__ID__-l1{display:block;font-family:'Impact','Arial Black',sans-serif;font-size:138px;color:#ffffff;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;text-shadow:0 0 38px rgba(255,255,255,.9),0 0 110px rgba(255,255,255,.45);line-height:0.9;white-space:nowrap;} .cls-__ID__-l2{display:block;font-family:'Impact','Arial Black',sans-serif;font-size:138px;color:#cc0000;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;text-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(204,0,0,1),0 0 160px rgba(204,0,0,.6);line-height:0.9;white-space:nowrap;} .cls-__ID__-cta{position:absolute;bottom:9%;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-family:'Arial',sans-serif;font-size:40px;color:#ffffff;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.22em;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.78);padding:26px 72px;white-space:nowrap;opacity:0;text-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(255,255,255,.65);box-shadow:0 0 35px rgba(255,255,255,.18),inset 0 0 35px rgba(255,255,255,.06);}
html:
YOUR OWNAI AGENT
WATCH TILL THE END
initJs: var cv=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-cv');var ctx=cv.getContext('2d');var W=1080,H=1920,CX=540,CY=384;var pts=[];for(var i=0;i<800;i++){var a=Math.random()*Math.PI*2,r=65+Math.random()*340;pts.push({a:a,r:r,spd:(0.009+Math.random()*.021)*(Math.random()<.35?-1:1),life:Math.random(),decay:0.0038+Math.random()*.007,sz:0.5+Math.random()*3,op:0.38+Math.random()*.52});}function tick(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);for(var i=0;i<pts.length;i++){var p=pts[i];p.a+=p.spd;p.x=CX+Math.cos(p.a)*p.r;p.y=CY+Math.sin(p.a)*p.r;p.life+=p.decay;var a=p.op*Math.max(0,1-p.life);if(a>.005){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.sz,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,'+a+')';ctx.fill();}if(p.life>=1){p.a=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;p.r=65+Math.random()*340;p.spd=(0.009+Math.random()*.021)*(Math.random()<.35?-1:1);p.life=0;}}requestAnimationFrame(tick);}requestAnimationFrame(tick);var t=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-t');var cta=el.querySelector('.cls-__ID__-cta');el._tl=gsap.timeline({paused:true}).fromTo(cv,{opacity:0},{opacity:1,duration:0.65,ease:'power2.out'}).fromTo(t,{opacity:0,y:-38,filter:'blur(20px)'},{opacity:1,y:0,filter:'blur(0px)',duration:0.52,ease:'power3.out'},0.28).fromTo(cta,{opacity:0,y:32,scale:0.88},{opacity:1,y:0,scale:1,duration:0.58,ease:'back.out(1.7)'},1.4).to({},{duration:1.65}).to(t,{opacity:0,y:-28,duration:0.38,ease:'power2.in'}).to(cta,{opacity:0,scale:0.88,duration:0.36,ease:'power2.in'},'<').to(cv,{opacity:0,duration:0.48},'<');
